sections.name: A
sections.description: Multiple Choice, True/False, and Fill-in-the-Blank Questions

questions.text: What is the place value of the digit 9 in 79,456?
Which number is between 46,000 and 47,000?
Which fraction is less than 1/2?
What is 0.75 as a fraction?
How many days are in the months of January, March and May combined?

Half of 3 litres in ml is:

1 litre = 100 ml
February always has 28 days
A pentagon has 5 sides
7 days = 1 week

Find the perimeter of a square with side 13 cm: Perimeter = ___
4 hours 15 min = _____ min
Order from smallest to largest: 34,521 ; 43,521 ; 34,512 ; 43,512 →
Round 87,650 to the nearest 10,000: ___

The perimeter of a square with side 15 cm = _____ cm

How many millimetres are in 7 cm? _____ mm
What is 1/6 of 48? ___
What is the next number: 100 ; 200 ; 400 ; 800 ; ___
A clock shows 6:30 PM. What time was it 1 hour 15 minutes ago? ___
What is the last day of February in a non-leap year? ___
What is the value of the digit 0 in any number? ___
A packet has 24 sweets. There are 5 packets. Total sweets = ___
Write the Roman numeral for 40: ___
How many hours are in 1 week? ___
What is the value of 4 in 40,897? ___
Express 3/4 as a percentage: ___
A triangle has angles of 45° and 75°. What is the third angle? ___
A school has 38,452 exercise books. It receives a donation of 14,875 more books. How many books are there altogether?
A factory produced 96,000 bottles in a week. It sold 57,345 bottles. How many bottles remain?
Each crate holds 15 bottles of water. A shop has 148 crates. How many bottles are there in total?
720 pupils are seated in rows of 8. How many rows are there?
A football pitch is 90 m long and 60 m wide. What is the perimeter of the pitch?
Uwera earns 8,500 Frw per week. She spends 3,750 Frw on food and 1,200 Frw on transport. How much does she save?
A train departs at 9:20 AM and arrives at 1:05 PM. How long does the journey take?
A swimming pool holds 6,000 litres. A pump fills it at 250 litres per minute. How long will it take to fill the pool?
A garden is in the shape of a rectangle. Its length is 25 m and its width is 18 m. What is the area of the garden?
In a school, there are 18 classrooms. Each classroom has 45 pupils. How many pupils are in the school?
A baker bakes 12 loaves of bread per hour. How many loaves does he bake in an 8-hour working day?
A mother divides 72 oranges equally among 9 children. How many oranges does each child get?
Gisa has a 5 m ribbon. He uses 2 m 75 cm for a project. How much ribbon is left? (Give your answer in cm.)
Find the area of a square with side 16 m
A pupil reads 15 pages every day. How many pages will the pupil read in 3 weeks?
3/4 of the pupils in a class of 48 passed the test. How many pupils passed?
A rectangle has an area of 84 m² and a length of 12 m. What is the width?
A number is divided by 7 and the result is 56. What is the number?
Write the value of each digit in 76,432 using expanded form.
A water tank has 15,000 litres. Each day, 1,250 litres are used. After how many days will the tank be empty?
